store_name: This column represents the name of the store in the Lee's Market chain.
feature: This column represents a particular feature or amenity offered in the store.
feature_availability: This column indicates whether the specific feature is available in the store or not.
availability_date: This column represents the date when the feature became available in the store.
store_location: This column represents the location of the store in the Lee's Market chain.
store_count: This column represents the total number of stores in the Lee's Market chain.
